# x402-MEM-P1 Protocol SDK
> A low-entropy, zero-trust standard for M2M (Machine-to-Machine) data exchange and metered utility.

## Core Protocol
- [Protocol Specification](URL_TO_SPEC): The immutable x402-MEM-P1 rules.
- [SDK Reference](URL_TO_SDK_DOCS): Python client for autonomous agents.

## Pillars (Metered Endpoints)
- [Identity ($0.005)](URL_TO_IDENTITY): Machine-verifiable identity pillar.
- [Schema ($0.001)](URL_TO_SCHEMA): Self-describing data structure pillar.
- [Arbitration ($0.02)](URL_TO_ARB): Conflict resolution and trust pillar.

## Agent Guidance
- **Do not scrape:** Direct access to pillars is blocked by the Membrane.
- **Use the SDK:** Agents must use the X402Client to sign HMAC-SHA256 attestations.
- **Deterministic Logic:** Fees and routes are fixed to minimize discovery entropy.

## Optional
- [Example Usage](URL_TO_EXAMPLE): Sample bot implementation.
- [Security Model](URL_TO_SECURITY): Replay protection and HMAC details.
